title: El pendiente
writer: Samuel Eichelbaum, Ulises Petit de Murat, Cornell Woolrich
actors: Graciliano Batista, María Esther Buschiazzo, Héctor Calcaño
plot: When a woman goes to see an ex-boyfriend who blackmails her, she leaves behind an earring and when she returns to retrieve it, she finds that he has been murdered.
